name: Monolithic Power Systems
description: Monolithic Power Systems designs and sells high-performance power management semiconductors, DC/DC converters, drivers, lighting controls, and power modules for computing, automotive, industrial, communications, and consumer electronics markets.

marketCap.rationale: StockAnalysis reports MPWR's market capitalization history beginning at $265.5 million on November 19, 2004, the IPO trading date also listed in market-data profiles and supported by the November 18, 2004 final prospectus.

notes: Queued from the May 25, 2026 S&P 500 market-cap snapshot ranks 126-150.
